task_completion.description: Create a 'Security Systems' summary group after the Electrical section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row named 'Security Systems' is visible in the task list, positioned after the 'Electrical' section. It should be formatted as a summary task (typically bold text with an expandable/collapsible icon).

task_completion.description: Add the four specified security tasks under the summary group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four tasks are listed and indented under 'Security Systems': 1. 'Install security conduit and backboxes', 2. 'Pull security and low-voltage cable', 3. 'Install security panels, cameras, and card readers', 4. 'Test and commission security system'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct durations for the four new tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration' column shows '10 days', '5 days', '8 days', and '3 days' respectively for the four newly added tasks.

task_completion.description: Set the correct predecessors for the new tasks to make them sequential and linked to existing tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Predecessors' column shows the correct linking: Task 1 links to row 122, Task 2 links to Task 1's row, Task 3 links to Task 2's row, and Task 4 links to Task 3's row AND row 123. Alternatively, this can be verified via the Gantt chart arrows showing these dependencies.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Electric Contractor' resource to all four new tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Resource Names' column (or labels next to the Gantt chart bars) explicitly shows 'Electric Contractor' assigned to all four of the new security tasks.

The agent clicks the 'Save' icon in the ribbon, uses the Ctrl+S/Cmd+S shortcut, or there is no unsaved indicator (like an asterisk) next to the project name in the title bar at the end of the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ProjectLibre GUI to make the changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within the ProjectLibre application window, rather than editing an XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show the use of commands like 'sed', 'awk', 'echo', or python scripts to directly modify '/home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml'.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the task details into the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or pasting the task names, durations, predecessors, and resource names into the appropriate cells or dialog boxes within ProjectLibre.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a 'Security Systems' summary group with four sequential tasks. Durations: 10 days, 5 days, 8 days, 3 days. Predecessors: Task 1 depends on row 122 ('Pull wire in conduit and set area transformers'). Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3 AND row 123 ('Install and terminate electrical devices'). All four tasks must have the resource 'Electric Contractor' assigned. The project must be saved.
